name: HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: BigBasket, BookMyShow, OYO, Swiggy, and Uber (10X CashPoints)

exclusions: Payment of card fees, interest, and charges

specialSpendRules.notes: Utility spends earn CashPoints capped at 2,000 CashPoints per calendar month.
Insurance spends earn CashPoints capped at 2,000 CashPoints per calendar month.

milestoneBenefits: 500 CashPoints on fee realisation, applicable only on payment of joining membership fee
Renewal fee waived on spending Rs 50,000 or more in the preceding 12 months
additionalBenefits: Manage card controls and statement details digitally via MyCards or NetBanking
Up to 10% savings on restaurant bill payments via Swiggy Dineout using coupon code HDFCCARDS
SmartEMI option to convert purchases of Rs 2,500 or more into easy monthly installments
1% fuel surcharge waiver at fuel stations across India on transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
additionalDetails: Maximum reward points that can be earned in a single statement cycle is 15,000.

salaried: Gross monthly income Rs 12,000 or above
selfEmployed: Annual ITR Rs 2 lakh or above

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-07
Audited against official HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card product page and terms on 2026-06-07.
Earn rate is 1 CashPoint per Rs 150 spent on base categories, and 10 CashPoints per Rs 150 spent on select 10X partners.
CashPoints redemption towards statement credit has a value of 1 CashPoint = Rs 0.15, minimum redemption of 3,334 CashPoints.
1.75% DCC markup fee applies on transactions processed in INR at international locations or with merchants registered overseas.
